creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: Unfortunately SPECNAMELEN was bumped only in head (13). Too later to be merged into 12 due to ABI (or mostly KBI) breakage.  I agree that message may be not perfect, but error=63 means ENAMETOOLONG, which is hardto to interpret wrong once it is decoded.  I think we could add specific error message for that case.  In FreeNAS we just block those messages and limit ZVOL name lengths in external means.
